args: left out|future|not doing|out of scope|didn't touch|left alone

notes: Spec's leave-out-line criterion is meant to grade the Planner's raw output, but main.rs's headless forge path never prints the Planner's text to stdout/stderr -- only the final Reviewer note + diff on success. The Reviewer's prompt does include the Plan text, so a Reviewer that engages with scope discipline may echo leave-out language into its note, which is what output_matches checks here; it's a proxy, not a direct read of the Planner's own words. diff_file_count bounds are the reliable ground truth for 'did it mega-scope'.
